# Test smart generator with binary introspection
# Verifies that the smart generator can analyze binaries and generate valid commands

# Start test server
mcp-server-start echoserver -- go run ./examples/servers/mcp-echo-server

# Test binary introspection
exec go test -v -run TestBinaryIntrospection ./fuzzing
stdout 'Introspected binary:'
stdout 'Supports help: true'
stdout 'Accepts stdin:'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test smart generator creation
exec go test -v -run TestSmartGeneratorCreation ./fuzzing
stdout 'Smart generator initialized'
stdout 'Binary cache populated'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test command generation with introspection
exec go test -v -run TestSmartCommandGeneration ./fuzzing
stdout 'Generated smart exec command'
stdout 'Valid command structure'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test validation and regeneration
exec go test -v -run TestValidateAndRegenerate ./fuzzing
stdout 'Validation passed'
stdout 'Generated valid script'
stdout 'PASS'
